summary: Made two surgical seam edits: one in the opening scene to carry forward Elise's physical secrecy from the chapter 10 aftermath, and one in the closing paragraph to point more cleanly into chapter 12's morning market continuation.
edits: Added a brief opening callback to the moved-press aftermath while Elise packs the primers.
Adjusted the final sentence to foreshadow the market stalls still rising by morning.
